korean.politics: 6·3 전국동시지방선거 공식 선거운동 기간이 막바지에 접어들었다. 여론조사 공표 금지 기간이 시작되면서 선거 결과 예측이 어려워졌고, 여야 후보들은 막판 지지층 결집에 총력을 기울였다.
korean.economy: 삼성전자 노사 잠정합의안 찬반투표 결과가 발표됐다. 투표율 95.5%, 찬성 73.7%로 합의안이 가결되며 전 세계 반도체 공급망 차질 우려가 해소됐다. 합의안의 핵심은 DS(반도체) 부문 영업이익의 10.5%를 성과급 재원으로 활용해 1인당 평균 약 4억 6천만 원의 보너스를 지급하는 것이다.
korean.society: 이슬람 최대 명절 이드 알아드하(희생제)가 전 세계적으로 기념되는 가운데, 전쟁 중인 가자지구에서는 폐허 위에서 기도를 드리는 무슬림들의 모습이 전해졌다. 유럽 각지에서 5월 기록적 폭염으로 사망자가 발생했다.
korean.international: 미군이 이란의 드론 공격에 대응해 이란 군사 시설을 추가 공습했다. 이스라엘은 가자에서 하마스 군사부문 새 수장 무함마드 오데를 사살했다고 발표했다. 이스라엘의 레바논 남부 공습으로 최소 31명이 숨졌다. 2026 FIFA 월드컵 개막이 15일 앞으로 다가온 가운데 FIFA가 티켓 판매와 관련해 뉴욕·뉴저지 당국의 법원 소환을 받았다.
korean.tech: 삼성전자 노사 합의 소식에 전 세계 AI 기업들이 HBM 반도체 공급 안정화에 안도했다. 에볼라 대응과 관련해 WHO 사무총장이 콩고 수도 킨샤사를 직접 방문해 현장 대응 상황을 점검했다.

english.politics: South Korea's official campaign period for the June 3 nationwide local elections entered its final stretch. With the mandatory polling blackout now in effect, predictions became difficult to make, and candidates from both sides of the aisle launched final pushes to mobilize their bases.
english.economy: Samsung Electronics' tentative wage deal was ratified by union members with 73.7% voting in favor on a 95.5% turnout, ending the threat of a global chip supply disruption. Under the agreement, 10.5% of the DS semiconductor division's operating profit will be allocated as a performance bonus, equating to an average payout of roughly $340,000 per worker.
english.society: Muslims around the world marked Eid al-Adha, though celebrations were somber in Gaza, where worshippers prayed amid rubble. A record-breaking May heat wave swept through Europe, causing deaths at outdoor sports events.
english.international: U.S. forces carried out additional defensive strikes against an Iranian military facility in response to Iranian drone attacks. Israel announced the killing of Mohammed Odeh, the new head of Hamas's military wing. Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon killed at least 31 people. With just 15 days until the 2026 FIFA World Cup, the tournament faced controversy after FIFA was subpoenaed by New York and New Jersey authorities in a ticket sales investigation.
english.tech: Global AI companies expressed relief over the stabilization of HBM chip supply following Samsung's ratified wage deal. The WHO Director-General traveled to Kinshasa, DRC to assess the Ebola response firsthand amid reports of over 1,000 confirmed cases.

vocabulary.example: Samsung Electronics' tentative wage deal was ratified by union members with 73.7% voting in favor.
With the mandatory polling blackout now in effect, predictions became difficult to make.
Candidates launched final pushes to mobilize their bases ahead of the election.
FIFA was subpoenaed by New York and New Jersey authorities in a ticket sales investigation.
Eid al-Adha celebrations were somber in Gaza, where worshippers prayed amid rubble.
10.5% of the DS division's operating profit will be allocated as a performance bonus.

sentences.sentence: Samsung Electronics' tentative wage deal was ratified by union members with 73.7% voting in favor on a 95.5% turnout, ending the threat of a global chip supply disruption.
sentences.point: 'with + 숫자 + 분사'는 투표 결과를 간결하게 나타내는 패턴. 'ending the threat of ~'는 결과를 설명하는 분사구로 문장을 자연스럽게 마무리.
sentences.similar: The trade agreement was approved by parliament with 68% voting in favor on record turnout, easing tensions between the two nations.

sentences.sentence: Muslims around the world marked Eid al-Adha, though celebrations were somber in Gaza, where worshippers prayed amid rubble.
sentences.point: 'though + 절'은 '~이지만'이라는 양보 구조. 'where + 관계절'은 앞서 언급한 장소를 보충 설명할 때 사용.
sentences.similar: Voters across the country cast their ballots, though turnout was low in rural areas, where access to polling stations remained difficult.

sentences.sentence: With just 15 days until the 2026 FIFA World Cup, the tournament faced controversy after FIFA was subpoenaed by New York and New Jersey authorities in a ticket sales investigation.
sentences.point: 'with just + 기간 + until ~'은 카운트다운 상황을 표현하는 뉴스 서두 패턴. 'be subpoenaed by'는 수동태 법률 표현.
sentences.similar: With just two weeks until the summit, the host country faced a diplomatic crisis after its foreign minister was accused of leaking confidential documents.

expressions.usage: 선거를 앞두고 정치인이나 정당이 핵심 지지층을 모아 투표 참여를 독려할 때 사용
expressions.example: With just days until the election, both parties launched rallies to mobilize their base.

expressions.usage: 경쟁·협상·캠페인 등이 결말을 향해 다가가는 마지막 단계를 표현
expressions.example: With the campaign in its final stretch, candidates focused all resources on swing districts.

expressions.usage: 전쟁·재해로 파괴된 현장을 배경으로 묘사할 때 사용하는 저널리즘 표현
expressions.example: Residents held a memorial service amid rubble where their neighborhood had once stood.

challenge.korean: 삼성전자 잠정합의안이 투표율 95.5%, 찬성 73.7%로 가결되면서 글로벌 반도체 공급 차질 우려가 해소됐다.
challenge.answer: Samsung Electronics' tentative wage deal was ratified with 73.7% voting in favor on a 95.5% turnout, ending the threat of a global chip supply disruption.
challenge.explanation: 'be ratified(가결되다)'는 수동태 표현. 'with + 숫자 + voting in favor'는 투표 결과를 간결하게 나타내는 패턴이며, 'ending the threat of ~'는 결과를 이어주는 분사 구조.

sources.title: Bloomberg - Samsung Staff Accept Wage Deal
Korea Herald - Samsung Wage Deal Passes
